query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.displayName,
  p.totalPoints AS storedBasePoints,
  COALESCE(SUM(b.pointsAwarded), 0) AS boostPoints,
  p.totalPoints + COALESCE(SUM(b.pointsAwarded), 0) AS canonicalLeaderboardTotal
FROM participants p
LEFT JOIN boost_wins b ON b.userId = p.userId AND b.challengeId = p.challengeId
GROUP BY p.id, p.displayName, p.totalPoints
ORDER BY canonicalLeaderboardTotal DESC
LIMIT 10;
